elements.title: lang::report_page_074_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_f.id                                                                                                as fid,
       kbi_f.name,
       kbi_c.fullname,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_fp.id)                                                                               AS all_posts,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_fp.id) /
       GREATEST(PERIOD_DIFF(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m'), DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_cm.added), '%Y%m')), 1)  as avg_month,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_fp.id) /
       GREATEST(CEILING(DATEDIFF(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_cm.added), '%Y%m%d')) / 7),
                1)                                                                                         as avg_week,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_fp.id) /
       GREATEST(DATEDIFF(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_cm.added), '%Y%m%d')), 1) as avg_day,
       popular_day.day                                                                                     AS popular_day,
       popular_hour.hour                                                                                   AS popular_hour,
       popular_week.week                                                                                   AS popular_week
FROM mdl_forum kbi_f
       JOIN mdl_modules kbi_m ON kbi_m.name = 'forum'
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_modules kbi_cm ON kbi_cm.course = kbi_f.course AND kbi_cm.instance = kbi_f.id AND kbi_cm.module = kbi_m.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_f.course
       LEFT JOIN mdl_forum_discussions kbi_fd ON kbi_fd.forum = kbi_f.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_forum_posts kbi_fp ON kbi_fp.discussion = kbi_fd.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT a.posts, a.day, a.id
                  FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_fp2.id)                             as posts,
                               WEEKDAY(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_fp2.created, '%Y-%m-%d %T')) AS day,
                               kbi_f2.id
                        FROM mdl_forum kbi_f2
                               LEFT JOIN mdl_forum_discussions kbi_fd2 ON kbi_fd2.forum = kbi_f2.id
                               LEFT JOIN mdl_forum_posts kbi_fp2 ON kbi_fp2.discussion = kbi_fd2.id
                        WHERE kbi_f2.course = :courseid
                        GROUP BY day, kbi_f2.id
                        ORDER BY posts DESC) AS a
                  GROUP BY a.id) as popular_day ON popular_day.id = kbi_f.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT a.posts, a.hour, a.id
                  FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_fp2.id) as posts, FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_fp2.created, '%H') AS hour, kbi_f2.id
                        FROM mdl_forum kbi_f2
                               LEFT JOIN mdl_forum_discussions kbi_fd2 ON kbi_fd2.forum = kbi_f2.id
                               LEFT JOIN mdl_forum_posts kbi_fp2 ON kbi_fp2.discussion = kbi_fd2.id
                        WHERE kbi_f2.course = :courseid
                        GROUP BY hour, kbi_f2.id
                        ORDER BY posts DESC) AS a
                  GROUP BY a.id) as popular_hour ON popular_hour.id = kbi_f.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT a.posts, a.week, a.id
                  FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_fp2.id)                                             as posts,
                               CEILING(DAYOFMONTH(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_fp2.created, '%Y-%m-%d %T')) / 7) AS week,
                               kbi_f2.id
                        FROM mdl_forum kbi_f2
                               LEFT JOIN mdl_forum_discussions kbi_fd2 ON kbi_fd2.forum = kbi_f2.id
                               LEFT JOIN mdl_forum_posts kbi_fp2 ON kbi_fp2.discussion = kbi_fd2.id
                        WHERE kbi_f2.course = :courseid
                        GROUP BY week, kbi_f2.id
                        ORDER BY posts DESC) AS a
                  GROUP BY a.id) as popular_week ON popular_week.id = kbi_f.id
WHERE kbi_f.course = :courseid
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
GROUP BY kbi_f.id
ORDER BY all_posts DESC, kbi_f.name
